name: NetSports Indoor Facility
description:
1) There drinks for sale but no food.
2) Of the 6 courts; 3 of them require lines to be taped down which is doable. The nets are all quality pickleball nets. 
3) The costs is lower and reasonable as compared to most private clubs. 
4) The floor is clean and allows for solid bounce of the ball. 
5) Netsports is a quality indoor facility with well functioning air conditioning. 
6) The courts are shared with other sports but there are slots locked in for pickleball.

name: Pin Point Indoor Pickleball & Golf
description:
Welcome to the ultimate destination for both golf and pickleball enthusiasts. Our state-of-the-art facility caters to casual players and serious athletes alike, offering top-notch amenities and a vibrant community atmosphere.

Jump into a pickleball game on our CushionX courts. Whether you're looking to learn the basics or challenge yourself in competitive play or tournaments, our facilities are designed to elevate your game.  

Unwind and socialize in our sports bar. Enjoy a wide selection of drinks while catching up on live sports. It's the perfect place to relax after a game or meet up with friends.
